wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|Centennial Puzzle|2}}
{{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.
== Sources ==
* Can be dropped by fighting {{2|Elites}}, by buying from the {{2|Merchant}} or from {{2|Mechanics#Chests|Chests}}. See Chest and non-Chest chance at {{2|Relics}}.
* Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Calling Bell||2}}, {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.
<!--TODO: FIND RELIC SOURCES FROM EVENTS-->
== Interactions ==
*{{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}} only triggers when ''HP is lost'', not when ''taking damage''. Receiving damage that is fully {{KW|Block|Blocked|2}} will not trigger the relic.
**Effects that cause the player to ''lose HP'', rather than take damage, will circumvent any {{KW|Block||2}} present.
=== Synergies ===
====Cards====
*{{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}} can be triggered by any cards that invoke HP loss during the player's turn, such as {{C|Bloodletting||2}} and {{C|Brand||2}}.
**Because {{C|Brightest Flame||2}} deducts from the player's ''maximum'' HP, rather than their ''current'' HP, it will only trigger {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}} if the player's current HP is at its maximum. Conversely, if they are below maximum HP (IE they have lost HP at some point prior), their maximum HP will be reduced but {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}} will ''not'' trigger.
====Relics====
{{R|Royal Poison||2}}'s HP loss triggers {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}}.
=== Neutral ===
* {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}} can be triggered by attacking into an enemy with {{KW|Thorns||2}}.
* {{R|Tungsten Rod||2}} can potentially negate HP loss that would otherwise trigger {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}}.
**Because {{R|Demon Tongue||2}} ''heals'' HP rather than prevents HP loss, it does ''not'' negate {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}}'s damage trigger.
=== Anti-Synergies ===
* End-of-turn damage effects (Such as {{C|Beckon||2}} or {{C|Regret||2}}) will trigger {{R|Centennial Puzzle||2}} and immediately discard its drawn cards with the rest of the hand (provided effects such as {{KW|Retain||2}} and {{R|Runic Pyramid||2}} are not in play).
== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Centennial Puzzle to the game.
